description.s: In an ideal world we will know all the Colregs lights, shapes and sounds and at Yachtmaster we have to know these but at Day Skipper as long as you know the following I think you would be well served.

Sailing vessel                        – side lights and stern light  or tricolour   Power driven vessel <50m – side lights, stern light and steaming light   Power driven vessel >50m – side lights, stern light and two steaming lights one low in the bow and one higher aft   Fishing vessel                       – fishing – an all round red over and all round white   Fishing vessel                       – making way – all round red over and all round white and side lights and stern light   Trawler                                  – an all round green over and all round white   Trawler - making way          – an all round green over an all round white and side lights and stern light   Vessel at anchor <50m       – all round white light at the masthead   Vessel at anchor >50           – two all round white lights one high in the bow and the other lower in the stern
Motoring cone   Anchor Ball   The Alpha
for a diver down   The H
for have a pilot on board
– two short blasts   Running my engines astern – three short blasts   What are your intentions/No/Watch out – five short blasts

Power driven vessel underway – one long blast   Power driven vessel stopped in the water – two long blasts   Sailing, fishing, trawling, constrained by draught, restricted in ability to manoeuvre, not under command – one long blast followed by two short blasts – ‘A very popular group’
The flags that you should be aware of are;
Alpha           - I have a diver down
Bravo           - I am carrying dangerous cargo
Hotel            - I have a pilot on board
November  - Negative - No - the flag N over the flag C is a distress/Mayday signal
Quebec       - My vessel is healthy - I require free [Pratique](item://39c2619f-2fef-4bd2-a0ae-4d07a7972e6f)
\* = Important part of the Day Skipper syllabus
** = As it says together these are a Distress Signal
